brandIdentityProjection.tonality: Raw, energetic, honest, and warm. No pretension, just late-night heat and real street-side comfort.
brandIdentityProjection.communityPositioning: The neighborhood baseline for post-midnight cravings, quick morning chai runs, and legendary street-side shawarma.

colorPalette.primaryBackgroundDescription: Deep charcoal, mimicking the Pune night sky over Lane 5.
colorPalette.accentAmberDescription: Warm incandescent overhead lighting and fresh glowing embers.
colorPalette.teaBrownDescription: Rich, earthy, and aromatic tone of boiling Irani Chai.
colorPalette.streetNeonOrangeDescription: High-intensity neon warmth reminiscent of the late-night storefront glow.

typography.displayFontUsage: Impactful, high-volume headers, mimicking fast-paced, high-turnaround urban energy.
typography.bodyFontUsage: Industrial, utilitarian layouts, mimicking quick receipts, clean execution, and no-nonsense menu structures.

lightingAndAtmosphere.environment: High-contrast night-time depth, where dark backdrops make the steam from boiling chai and glowing shawarma spit-fires visually pop.
lightingAndAtmosphere.photographyDirection: Macro shots of rich, dripping garlic sauce, seasoned chicken spinning on the rotisserie, crisp toasted bun maska crusts, and natural steam curling off freshly poured clay cups of chai. Emphasize raw, real kitchen movement over staged plates.
lightingAndAtmosphere.cinematicTransitions: Slick, split-second cuts from high-energy street motion to slow-motion macro-frames of food preparation.

homepageHero.visualMedia: Autoplay, muted cinematic video loop of a carving knife slicing juicy chicken from the spinning shawarma spit, transitioning immediately into a high-angle pour of steaming Irani chai.

dynamicHeroBadge.style: Pulsing neon-orange indicator signifying active late-night operations.

primaryCallToAction.action: Trigger real-time location mapping and ordering channels.

interactiveSections.title: The Core Rotation
interactiveSections.subtitle: No massive menu books. Just high-velocity, high-satisfaction street-side staples done right.
interactiveSections.uiMechanism: Horizontally scrollable high-contrast cards focusing strictly on the big four: Shawarma, Irani Chai, Bun Maska, and Peri Peri Shawarma.

interactiveSections.title: Lane No. 5 Energy
interactiveSections.subtitle: Real scenes from the corner shop.
interactiveSections.uiMechanism: Grid layout showing real-time customer sentiment highlights, popular late-night hours, and a direct visual map pointing to the Airport Road / Sanjay Park intersection.

footer.layout: Utilitarian dashboard format displaying direct-access verified facts: Operating hours (Closes 3 AM), Phone (085510 61614), Address, and quick-route directions for drive-through customers.

brandVoiceProjections.text: Juicy chicken roasted slow, seasoned sharp, and wrapped tight. No-nonsense street food built for hunger at any hour.
Sweet, strong, and steaming hot. Paired with thick-cut buttered buns. The definitive Pune breakfast, or your 2:00 AM reset button.
When the rest of Pune sleeps, Sanjay Park is still cooking. Serving fresh, hot food up until 3:00 AM.

microInteractions.steamEffect: A subtle, CSS-driven ambient steam mist effect rising behind the Chai menu panel when hovered.
microInteractions.neonGlowToggle: Interactive 'Late-Night Mode' switch that dims the site's ambient light to mimic the exact atmosphere of standing outside Lane No. 5 under the warm yellow-orange neon glow.
microInteractions.fastTurnaroundNavigation: Tactile, instant-load menu navigation that mimics the rapid service and high-volume operations of the physical cafe.
